name: TIANJIN CAP. H  YC 1
summary: Tianjin Capital Environmental Protection Group Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the sewage treatment and construction of the sewage treatment plants in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Processing of Sewage Water; Recycled Water; Pipeline Connection; Heating and Cooling Service; Sales of Tap Water; Sale of Environmental Protection Equipment; and All Other segments. It also provides toll collection and engineering consulting services; environment governance, technical consulting services, etc.; technical consulting for water recycling business; and energy saving and research, consulting and transfer, and property management services, as well as invests in construction projects. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Tianjin, the People's Republic of China. Tianjin Capital Environmental Protection Group Company Limited is a subsidiary of Tianjin Municipal Investment Company Limited.
